query:
UPDATE tachyon_apps_compute.builds SET
            status = ?, cloud_build_id = ?,
            container_image = ?, artifact_path = ?,
            duration_secs = ?,
            error_message = ?, github_check_run_id = ?,
            github_installation_id = ?,
            iac_plan_output = ?,
            updated_at = ?
            WHERE id = ?
